diffs.diff:
--- a/explore_eval.py
+++ b/explore_eval.py
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+import os, inspect

+os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE']='1'

+from VLABench.evaluation.evaluator.base import Evaluator

+print(inspect.getsource(Evaluator.evaluate_single_episode))

+print('='*80)

+print(inspect.getsource(Evaluator.evaluate))

+print('='*80)

+# Find load_env

+import VLABench.utils

+import pkgutil

+for m in pkgutil.iter_modules(VLABench.utils.__path__):

+    print('utils submodule:', m.name)

+# Look in VLABench root

+import VLABench

+for m in pkgutil.iter_modules(VLABench.__path__):

+    print('VLABench module:', m.name)

+import VLABench.tasks as vt

+for m in pkgutil.iter_modules(vt.__path__):

+    print('tasks module:', m.name)

+# Search files

+import subprocess

+out = subprocess.run(['grep','-rn','def load_env','/opt/VLABench/VLABench'], capture_output=True, text=True)

+print('grep load_env:')

+print(out.stdout)
